summary: Plan-only assessment for open PR #90227. The PR is a small, useful Windows-compatibility test fix, but it is not merge-ready because required merge preflight is incomplete and the current proof gate is failing. Recommend repairing the contributor branch rather than replacing or closing it.

actions.reason: Useful small PR, but merge policy requires proof gate, mergeability, comments/bot-review resolution, Codex /review, and validation evidence before merge_candidate.
A repair artifact is executable and preserves contributor credit; a merge action is currently blocked by failed proof and missing merge preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #90227 so the Windows-compatible Zalo credentials test change has accepted behavior proof and complete merge preflight. Keep the patch narrow and preserve aniruddhaadak80 as the source contributor.
repair_candidate.pr_title: test: make zalo credentials tests compatible with Windows
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair source PR #90227 by keeping the Zalo credentials test compatibility change narrow, producing accepted real behavior proof, and completing merge preflight. Credit: original source PR by @aniruddhaadak80 at https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90227.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for aniruddhaadak80 as the original author of PR #90227.
Keep source PR URL https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90227 in any repair notes or replacement path if replacement later becomes necessary.
